title: Super Server
description: Built for speed, tuned for stability: Super Server keeps your server running like a dream with smart, server-side optimizations.
body:
# Super Server
Built for speed, tuned for stability: Super Server keeps your server running like a dream with smart, server-side optimizations. Super Server always aims to run your server at 20 TPS.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fc0679d238985395ac8e2ff05fc00f2bdf8d117.jpeg)

## 📥 Install Guide
For a one click install, use [Modrinth Servers](https://modrinth.com/servers) or [mrpack4server](https://github.com/Patbox/mrpack4server) by Patbox for other server hosts/self hosting. If you are using Pterodactyl or Pelican please use [the egg for it.](https://github.com/pelican-eggs/minecraft/tree/main/java/modrinth)

## 🖥️ Features
### ⚡ Performance Improvements
- Advanced server profiling using Spark
- Lower memory usage with FerriteCore
- Faster networking and packet handling via Krypton
### 🛠 Server Management
- Better banning and moderation with BanHammer
- Server maintenance mode made easy with MaintenanceMode
- Console improvements such as adding color via Better Fabric Console
### ⚙️ Utility
- EssentialsX for Fabric in the form of Fuji
- View other players' inventories and enderchests, even when the player is offline with InvView
- Automatic and easy inventory rollbacks with InvRestore

## 🔧 Compatibility
If you're looking to expand your server's mod list beyond the base modpack, here's a list of some nice server side mods that play very well with this modpack
- LuckPerms
- Geyser
- Grim Anticheat for Fabric
- Simple Voice Chat
